name: Fruit Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the cake into thin layers.
2. Spread each layer with jam and half the apricot puree.
3. Sandwich the layers back together.
4. Cut into bars, about 1-by-2-inches, and pack them into a 2-quart serving dish.
5. Arrange oranges around the cake.
6. Pour Marsala over the top.
7. Spread with remaining apricot puree.
8. Cover with custard.
9. Cover and chill for 2 hours.
10. Whip cream with sugar until stiff.
11. Frost on top of trifle and decorate with candied fruits, if desired.
